tool.name: comprehensive_subdomain_enum
tool.description: Run comprehensive subdomain enumeration combining passive, external tools, smart generation, and active DNS brute-forcing.

parameter.name: stealth
parameter.description: Enable stealth mode (slower, more careful). Default: false.

parameter.name: include_bruteforce
parameter.description: Include DNS brute-forcing phase. Default: true.

parameter.name: bruteforce_size
parameter.description: Wordlist size for bruteforce: small, medium, large. Default: medium.

parameter.name: use_external_tools
parameter.description: Try to use subfinder/assetfinder if available. Default: true.

returns.description: All discovered subdomains, results by source, and sources_used.
